subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath, through the power of the Friend, shattered the idol of vain imaginings and rent asunder the intervening veils. This is that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خدا را که صنم وهم را بقدرت خلیل شکستی و حجاب مانعه را دریدی اینست آن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael
